## Summary

<!-- What does this PR do? One or two sentences. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] `feat` — new feature or MCP tool
- [ ] `fix` — bug fix
- [ ] `refactor` — no behaviour change
- [ ] `docs` — documentation only
- [ ] `chore` — tooling / deps / config
- [ ] `test` — tests only
- [ ] Breaking change (add `!` to PR title and describe below)

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm test` passes locally
- [ ] PR title is a valid Conventional Commit message
- [ ] README updated if public API / MCP tools / config changed
- [ ] CHANGELOG entry added under `## [Unreleased]` (user-facing changes only)

## Breaking changes

<!-- If this is a breaking change, describe what breaks and the migration path. -->
